name: Apple Crumb Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Measure the water into a small bowl. Sprinkle yeast on top and stir until dissolved.
3. Cream butter thoroughly in a large electric mixing bowl. Gradually add sugar and salt. Beat together.
4. Add the yeast mixture, eggs, and milk. Beat at medium speed until well blended.
5. Gradually add and blend in the flour while beating at medium speed; beat until the mixture is well blended.
6. Spread batter in a well-greased 9x9-inch pan.
7. Arrange Apple Crumb Topping over dough. Cover and let rise in a warm place, free from draft, until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes at 375°F. Turn out onto a wire rack and cool.
Apple Crumb Topping:
- Apples, peeled and sliced (3 large)
- Sugar (2/3 cup)
- Flour (1/2 cup)
- Cinnamon (2 tsp)
- Butter, softened (6 tbsp)
Combine the remaining ingredients and mix until crumbly. Sprinkle over apples before baking.
